entries.text:
Verse 8

sinful

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23").

Verse 12

if thou will

The leper, knowing the Lord's power to heal, seems to question His willingness.

Verse 20

sins

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23")

Verse 30

sinners

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23").

Verse 32

sinners

See, Romans 5:6; Romans 5:8; 1 Timothy 1:15.

Verse 37

bottles

i.e. wineskins.
